summary: Verified existing review-escalation implementation: after 3 review FAILs, task.status becomes 'blocked' and task.lastReason is 'review-escalation: 3 rounds exceeded'. The pure functions (incrementReviewRounds, shouldEscalate, deduplicateFindings, buildEscalationComment, buildEscalationSummary) and run.mjs wiring are in place; comprehensive unit + integration tests already exist and all 580 tests pass.
